title: brachypodium asperum
intro: Brachypodium asperum, also known as rough false brome, is a type of perennial grass native to Europe and Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and infections. The plant has been reported to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the roots and leaves of Brachypodium asperum are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
